description_long: This house is a modern, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior features large, grid-like windows on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The building is divided into multiple rooms, visible through the open-plan layout and interior partitions. The main entryway is marked by a prominent black panel and a large glass door, providing a striking contrast to the otherwise light-colored walls. The interior appears to include communal areas, private rooms, and utility spaces, all arranged in a linear fashion. The overall aesthetic is clean and functional, with an emphasis on geometric lines and open sightlines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large grid windows, light-colored walls, and a prominent black entry panel. The design is minimalist and open, with multiple rooms and a striking glass entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing large grid windows, a black entry panel, and the main glass door.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, interior partitions, and fewer exterior windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a focus on the building's length and internal layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting additional rooms, interior corridors, and utility spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a large glass door set within a black panel, no porch or steps, minimalist and bold.
